description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has four jobs: lin-build, lin-test, win-makepkg, and win-test. The lin-build job builds the project on Ubuntu 18 and 20, installs dependencies, creates a tarball, and uploads it as an artifact. The lin-test job downloads the artifact, installs the package, and tests it on Ubuntu 18 and 20. The win-makepkg job builds the project on Windows with different architectures, installs dependencies, creates a package, and uploads it as an artifact. The win-test job downloads the artifact, installs the package, and tests it on Windows with different architectures.
